name: Checkout form shows a Turkish validation error for an invalid phone number
description: Verifies that once the cart has an item, the /odeme form renders and typing an invalid phone number then blurring the field shows the exact Turkish inline validation error.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /olusturucu, select any brand and model in the 'Aracınızı Seçin' section, type '2021' into 'Model yılı' and 'Sedan' into 'Kasa / versiyon', pick any floor and edge color, then click 'Sepete Ekle'
The checkout page shows an order form (not the empty-cart message) with fields for Ad Soyad, Telefon, Şehir, and Adres
Type '123' into the Telefon (phone) field, then click/tab away from the field to blur it
An inline error message appears near the phone field with the text 'Geçerli bir telefon numarası girin (örn: 05XX XXX XX XX)'
